discuss the mathematical methods used for birth time
rectification in the next section of this article. But it seems
that some background information about the divisions of
'Ahoratra' would be beneficial prior to starting such a study.
Therefore in the next section I will discuss the efforts to
determine the rhythm of day, by the use of the divisions of
Ahoratra.

Rhythm of Day
It is the mathematical methods that help astrologers in
rectifying birth time, rather than the understanding about
definition of birth time. Because of this the methods described
below are more important to an astrologer, than definition of
birth time discussed earlier.
Whatever be the accepted opinion about birth time,
considering the error in time shown by watches, the delay
and error nurse may commit in noting and reporting birth
time to the parents, however anyone may try, an approximate"
error of 3 minutes may happen for sure. This is a fact we
should accept.
